
    Sender                Mail Server              Receiver
                             _____
  .---------.    SMTP       |=====|      POP      .---------.
  |         |-------------->|     |<--------------|         |
  |  Alice  |               |     |               |   Bob   |
  +---------+               |  o  |               +---------+
 /// _____ \\\              |_____|              /// _____ \\\
'-------------'                                 '-------------'
                    +---------------------+
                    |"To: bob@bar.com"    |
                    |"From: alice@foo.com"|
                    |"Body: Hi!"          |
                    +---------------------+
